feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Add default value to custom field - CFL
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have added one custom field using Custom Field Fiori App. I want to pass default value to this filed.

Business Context - EAMS_NTF

I have checked following Badi. But here I can't see my custom field.

BADI_EVENT_PRIORITIZATION
EAM_NOTIFICATION_FIELD_CONTROL
EAM_LTXT_TML_MAINT_NOTIF

Can you suggest any other way I can pass the value?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Can Anyone tell me how to use this following BAPI to create multiple inforecords?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am working on a program where I am uploading an excel file and posting the data into the bapi  me_inforecord_maintain_multi  .

But Inforecords Number not getting generated from the bapi, though sy-subrc = 0 after the bapi execution!

Below Posting my code. For each item there should be unique inforecods number, means for 5 materials in the file there should be 5 infnr.

CALL FUNCTION 'ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE'
    EXPORTING
      filename                = p_file
      i_begin_col             = '1'
      i_begin_row             = p_brow
      i_end_col               = '170'
      i_end_row               = p_erow
    TABLES
      intern                  = it_exload
    EXCEPTIONS
      inconsistent_parameters = 1
      upload_ole              = 2
      OTHERS                  = 3.

  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'Problem in excel sheet'  TYPE 'E'.
    LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
  ENDIF.

  SELECT zno
      FROM zinfo
      ORDER BY zno DESCENDING
      INTO @DATA(l_sl)
      UP TO 1 ROWS.
  ENDSELECT.

  l_sl = l_sl + 1.

  CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT'
    EXPORTING
      input  = l_sl
    IMPORTING
      output = l_sl.

  SORT it_exload BY row col.

  LOOP AT it_exload INTO wa_exload.

    CASE wa_exload-col.
      WHEN '0001'.
        lw_acc-matnr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0002'.
        lw_acc-lifnr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0003'.
        lw_acc-ekorg = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0004'.
        lw_acc-werks = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0005'.
        lw_acc-ekgrp = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0006'.
        lw_acc-aplfz = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0007'.
        CALL FUNCTION 'KCD_EXCEL_DATE_CONVERT'
          EXPORTING
            excel_date  = wa_exload-value
            date_format = 'TMJ'
          IMPORTING
            sap_date    = wa_exload-value.

        lw_acc-valid_from = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0008'.
        lw_acc-waers = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0009'.
        lw_acc-netpr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0010'.
        lw_acc-peinh = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0011'.
        lw_acc-bprme = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0012'.
        lw_acc-bpumz = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0013'.
        lw_acc-bpumn = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0014'.
        lw_acc-lmein = wa_exload-value.

    ENDCASE.

    AT END OF row.


      lw_acc-zno = l_sl.
      lw_acc-vaild_to = '99991231'.
      lw_acc-kschl = 'PB00'.

      APPEND lw_acc TO lt_acc.
      CLEAR lw_acc.
    ENDAT.

  ENDLOOP.


  SELECT
          a~matnr,
          b~meins

    FROM @LT_acc AS a INNER JOIN
    mara AS b
    ON
      ltrim( a~matnr, '0' ) = ltrim( b~matnr, '0' )
    INTO TABLE @DATA(it_unit).




  LOOP AT lt_acc INTO DATA(wa_acc).

    IF wa_acc-matnr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-lifnr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-ekorg IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-werks IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-ekgrp IS INITIAL
    OR wa_acc-valid_from IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-waers IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-netpr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-peinh IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-bprme IS INITIAL .

      MESSAGE 'Please fill All manadatory Fields' TYPE 'E'.
      LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
    ENDIF.

    READ TABLE it_unit INTO DATA(wa_unit) WITH  KEY matnr = wa_acc-matnr.

    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_CUNIT_OUTPUT'
      EXPORTING
        input    = wa_unit-meins
        language = sy-langu
      IMPORTING
        output   = wa_unit-meins.


    IF sy-subrc = 0.

      IF wa_unit-meins <> wa_acc-bprme.
        IF wa_acc-bpumz IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-bpumn IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-lmein IS INITIAL.
          MESSAGE 'Please fill All manadatory Fields' TYPE 'E'.
          LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.

    ENDIF.

  ENDLOOP.




  LOOP AT lt_acc INTO DATA(wa).


    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' EXPORTING input = wa-matnr IMPORTING output = wa-matnr.
    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' EXPORTING input = wa-lifnr IMPORTING output = wa-lifnr.



APPEND VALUE #( material =  wa-matnr
                vendor =   wa-lifnr )
 TO itab1.

APPEND VALUE #( material =  'X'
                vendor =   'X' )
 TO itab2.

APPEND VALUE #( purch_org = wa-ekorg  plant = wa-werks pur_group = wa-ekgrp plnd_delry = wa-aplfz gr_basediv = 'X' )
 TO itab3.
APPEND VALUE #( purch_org = 'X'  plant = 'X' pur_group = 'X' plnd_delry = 'X' gr_basediv = 'X' )
 TO itab4.
APPEND VALUE #( valid_from = wa-valid_from valid_to = wa-vaild_to  )
 TO itab5.


  CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_CUNIT_INPUT'
      EXPORTING
        input    = wa-lmein
        language = sy-langu
      IMPORTING
        output   = wa-lmein.


APPEND VALUE #( cond_type = wa-kschl currency = wa-waers cond_value = wa-netpr  cond_p_unt  = wa-peinh
cond_unit = wa-bprme numerator = wa-bpumz  denominator = wa-bpumn base_uom = wa-lmein )
 TO itab6.


    MODIFY lt_acc FROM wa.


  ENDLOOP.




  CALL FUNCTION 'ME_INFORECORD_MAINTAIN_MULTI'
    IMPORTING
      et_eina       = lt_eina_e
      et_eine       = lt_eine_e
    TABLES
      t_eina        = itab1
      t_einax       = itab2
      t_eine        = itab3
      t_einex       = itab4
      cond_validity = itab5
      condition     = itab6
      return        = lt_return.











  IF sy-subrc = 0.

    LOOP AT lt_acc ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>).

      READ TABLE lt_eina_e ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs1>) WITH  KEY material = <fs>-matnr.

      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        <fs>-infnr = <fs1>-info_rec.
      ENDIF.

    ENDLOOP.

Getting bapi lt_return table message as "material is not activated" .

Tried with leading zeros in matnr , still not working.

CALL FUNCTION 'ALSM_EXCEL_TO_INTERNAL_TABLE'
    EXPORTING
      filename                = p_file
      i_begin_col             = '1'
      i_begin_row             = p_brow
      i_end_col               = '170'
      i_end_row               = p_erow
    TABLES
      intern                  = it_exload
    EXCEPTIONS
      inconsistent_parameters = 1
      upload_ole              = 2
      OTHERS                  = 3.

  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'Problem in excel sheet'  TYPE 'E'.
    LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
  ENDIF.

  SELECT zno
      FROM zinfo
      ORDER BY zno DESCENDING
      INTO @DATA(l_sl)
      UP TO 1 ROWS.
  ENDSELECT.

  l_sl = l_sl + 1.

  CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT'
    EXPORTING
      input  = l_sl
    IMPORTING
      output = l_sl.

  SORT it_exload BY row col.

  LOOP AT it_exload INTO wa_exload.

    CASE wa_exload-col.
      WHEN '0001'.
        lw_acc-matnr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0002'.
        lw_acc-lifnr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0003'.
        lw_acc-ekorg = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0004'.
        lw_acc-werks = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0005'.
        lw_acc-ekgrp = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0006'.
        lw_acc-aplfz = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0007'.
        CALL FUNCTION 'KCD_EXCEL_DATE_CONVERT'
          EXPORTING
            excel_date  = wa_exload-value
            date_format = 'TMJ'
          IMPORTING
            sap_date    = wa_exload-value.

        lw_acc-valid_from = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0008'.
        lw_acc-waers = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0009'.
        lw_acc-netpr = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0010'.
        lw_acc-peinh = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0011'.
        lw_acc-bprme = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0012'.
        lw_acc-bpumz = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0013'.
        lw_acc-bpumn = wa_exload-value.
      WHEN '0014'.
        lw_acc-lmein = wa_exload-value.

    ENDCASE.

    AT END OF row.


      lw_acc-zno = l_sl.
      lw_acc-vaild_to = '99991231'.
      lw_acc-kschl = 'PB00'.

      APPEND lw_acc TO lt_acc.
      CLEAR lw_acc.
    ENDAT.

  ENDLOOP.


  SELECT
          a~matnr,
          b~meins

    FROM @LT_acc AS a INNER JOIN
    mara AS b
    ON
      ltrim( a~matnr, '0' ) = ltrim( b~matnr, '0' )
    INTO TABLE @DATA(it_unit).




  LOOP AT lt_acc INTO DATA(wa_acc).

    IF wa_acc-matnr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-lifnr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-ekorg IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-werks IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-ekgrp IS INITIAL
    OR wa_acc-valid_from IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-waers IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-netpr IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-peinh IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-bprme IS INITIAL .

      MESSAGE 'Please fill All manadatory Fields' TYPE 'E'.
      LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
    ENDIF.

    READ TABLE it_unit INTO DATA(wa_unit) WITH  KEY matnr = wa_acc-matnr.

    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_CUNIT_OUTPUT'
      EXPORTING
        input    = wa_unit-meins
        language = sy-langu
      IMPORTING
        output   = wa_unit-meins.


    IF sy-subrc = 0.

      IF wa_unit-meins <> wa_acc-bprme.
        IF wa_acc-bpumz IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-bpumn IS INITIAL OR wa_acc-lmein IS INITIAL.
          MESSAGE 'Please fill All manadatory Fields' TYPE 'E'.
          LEAVE LIST-PROCESSING AND RETURN TO SCREEN 0.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.

    ENDIF.

  ENDLOOP.




  LOOP AT lt_acc INTO DATA(wa).


    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' EXPORTING input = wa-matnr IMPORTING output = wa-matnr.
    CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_ALPHA_INPUT' EXPORTING input = wa-lifnr IMPORTING output = wa-lifnr.



APPEND VALUE #( material =  wa-matnr
                vendor =   wa-lifnr )
 TO itab1.

APPEND VALUE #( material =  'X'
                vendor =   'X' )
 TO itab2.

APPEND VALUE #( purch_org = wa-ekorg  plant = wa-werks pur_group = wa-ekgrp plnd_delry = wa-aplfz gr_basediv = 'X' )
 TO itab3.
APPEND VALUE #( purch_org = 'X'  plant = 'X' pur_group = 'X' plnd_delry = 'X' gr_basediv = 'X' )
 TO itab4.
APPEND VALUE #( valid_from = wa-valid_from valid_to = wa-vaild_to  )
 TO itab5.


  CALL FUNCTION 'CONVERSION_EXIT_CUNIT_INPUT'
      EXPORTING
        input    = wa-lmein
        language = sy-langu
      IMPORTING
        output   = wa-lmein.


APPEND VALUE #( cond_type = wa-kschl currency = wa-waers cond_value = wa-netpr  cond_p_unt  = wa-peinh
cond_unit = wa-bprme numerator = wa-bpumz  denominator = wa-bpumn base_uom = wa-lmein )
 TO itab6.


    MODIFY lt_acc FROM wa.


  ENDLOOP.




  CALL FUNCTION 'ME_INFORECORD_MAINTAIN_MULTI'
    IMPORTING
      et_eina       = lt_eina_e
      et_eine       = lt_eine_e
    TABLES
      t_eina        = itab1
      t_einax       = itab2
      t_eine        = itab3
      t_einex       = itab4
      cond_validity = itab5
      condition     = itab6
      return        = lt_return.











  IF sy-subrc = 0.

    LOOP AT lt_acc ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs>).

      READ TABLE lt_eina_e ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs1>) WITH  KEY material = <fs>-matnr.

      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        <fs>-infnr = <fs1>-info_rec.
      ENDIF.

    ENDLOOP.

entry.title: CDS view for quantity confirmed in production order
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am looking for a CDS view in SAP Public Cloud for the following:

1. Actual quantity confirmed in production order along with movement type

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: CDS Views for Price Simulation of Customer/Material Combination in sales SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi team,

As per the requirement by Business,I wanted to create a report for a pricing simulation of sales order where price is maintained on Customer/Material Combination with Discount and Tax value.Please suggest a solution where I can fetch data in the form of report.

Also,kindly suggest a CDS View if available as its a priority kindly help 

Regards 

Dhanush

entry.title: Issue regarding multiple line items
entry.content: Hello dear experts. In my report there are multiple line items but when I pull data from the report through code only 1 item is showing multiple items. Please help I am stuck

entry.title: Sales order workflow value help in S4 Hana Public cloud.
entry.content:
What will be the service_path , entity and property for the field(Overall Status) of Sales order to implement the workflow value help badi.

ct_parameter = VALUE #( (

id = 'id_status'

  name = 'Overall Status'

xsd_type = if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>cs_xstype-string

  service_path = ?

  entity = ?

  property = ?

mandatory = abap_true )

Thanks & Regards

Shraddha

entry.title: SM30 - Screen Refresh of data added via TMG
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a scenario where in one of the customising, i.e., maintained via SM30, the screen is not getting refreshed after the data is saved to the table in the DB. 

Scenario:

The table stores information about the active/inactive details of an attribute for a specified validity. For example, material active/inactive in a given period. The requirement here is that when a user enters information about a material which is already present in the DB with a specific validity, say date 1 to date 2. Then a custom event is written which checks the validity of the newly entered entry, in this case same material but with overlapping validity, say date 4 and date 5. In this case the delimitation should happen automatically and if needed new record should be created. This can arise in a situation where the dates are in the following order date 1 < date 4 < date 5 < date 2. In such situation there would be 3 records formed by updating new record, creating the entered record and the additional new record. For example. Record 1 with validity date 1 to ( date 4 - 1), Record 2 with validity date 4 to date 5, and Record 3 with validity from ( date 5 + 1 ) to date 2. So the new record is generated but is not displayed on the maintenance screen unless the maintenance view is re-opened.

Expectation:

Once the date is saved to the DB the maintenance screen should also show the additional record created.

Example:

  • Existing Record in DB
    MaterialActiveValid From Valid To
    M12345X01.01.202031.12.9999
  • New Record from Customising
    MaterialActiveValid From Valid To
    M12345-01.01.202431.12.2024
  • Expected Records in the customising
    MaterialActiveValid From Valid To 
    M12345X01.01.202031.12.2023(existing)
    M12345 01.01.202431.12.2024(user input)
    M12345X01.01.202531.12.9999(generated)
  • Records displayed after the trigger of the event
    MaterialActiveValid FromValid To 
    M12345X01.01.202031.12.2023(existing & updated)
    M12345 01.01.202431.12.2024(user input)

As mentioned, the user can only see the generated data once the maintenance screen is re-loaded.

Technical Information:

  • Created a customising database table with the following information ( material (key), active indicator (key), valid from (key), and valid to.
  • Created a maintenance view on top of the database table and created a TMG on it.
  • Created a custom event for the TMG with event type as 01.

It would be great if someone can provide some working clue on how to achieve the refresh of the TMG screen when a new record is created programatically.

ABAP Extensibility SAP NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP

entry.title: cl_attachment_service_api usage in S/4HANA Cloud Public - Guidance Needed
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I'm new to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I'm currently learning how to handle attachments using the ABAP cl_attachment_service_api local API. I'm having trouble with basic operations like creating and deleting attachments, and I'm not sure how to make the attachments appear in the "Manage Documents" app.

Any guidance or code examples would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP PHR program not sending to all email addresses in Variant
entry.content:
I have a program in PHR - HR ERP Prod System.

The program allows for multiple email addresses to be maintained in the variant.  However, when the program is executed (both foreground and background) the email is only sent to the top of stack email address.  

Is there program logic that needs to be maintained to allow for the email to go to all recipients?

entry.title: how to create a Custom API in S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hello Team,

The requirement is to create a single API that handles posting of for eg: sales orders, deliveries, and goods issues from an external system. While there are standard APIs available for each business process, the client prefers a unified API that executes all these processes synchronously and returns a confirmation.

My question is, how can I create such an API in the S/4HANA Cloud Public system? I have come across blogs discussing the conversion of custom business objects into APIs, but I do not want anything to be stored in a business object. Could you please suggest a solution I can follow?

Regards,
Shankar G

entry.title: FM writes file to al11
entry.content:
hi,

I need to write a .csv file to AL11 via report.

Can anyone tell me which FM i can use?

 

thank you

entry.title: ILOCANALYSISCUBE_F - Could you please let us know what are the source tables associated with this an
entry.content: ILOCANALYSISCUBE_F - Could you please let us know what are the source tables associated with this and any weblink which provides these details?

entry.title: create and update sales order with API_SALES_ORDER_SRV using $batch with content-id in a changeset
entry.content:
I am trying to update the sales order schedule lines once the sales order is created using API_SALES_ORDER_SRV using $batch. 
i am getting 500 Internal server error. in SAP S4 HANA 2023. any one faced similar issue please help.

how to get the sales order number created in the first post call to do patch in the same changeset using Content-ID?. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Mass update a field in Z*table
entry.content:
Hi,
I need to mass update a field in a Z*table that has 20Millions entries.

I am using UPDATE Z*table set + COMMIT WORK while looping in an itab.

I scheduled it as background job which is taking like 6-8 hrs..

Is there any way to make this more faster?

entry.title: shopping cart in MM for SAP Help
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

How are you?

I have some questions about the shopping cart in MM for SAP, I need to know and information about shopping cart and what, where, How? ..... etc, for where is using the shopping cart in SAP and how to use this in any project.

And what is the benefit for shopping cart and what is the circle or workflow for the shopping cart for any project if you have any example?

If there anyone you can explain to me and if you have any website or photo to help me pls shared with me.

Thank you,

#ERP #MM #SAP #material_management #MM #cart #s4hana #sap #help #support #workflow

entry.title: Barcode Scanning function using ABAP
entry.content:
I would like to know can we create barcode scanning action using ABAP in eclipse ADT.

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Call web URL in ABAP class (eclipse ADT)
entry.content:
I want to use a web link/ URL  (example link : https://www.sap.com) inside ABAP class in eclipse .But facing issues like call methods, cl_gui_frontend_services  and other function modules are not permitted. Calling Web URL directly into ABAP  class is possible? or any alternative methods are there ? pls provide a solution to this.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment  BW SAP HANA Modeling Tools (Eclipse) 

#ECLIPSE

entry.title: RAP vs CAP (database-wise)
entry.content:
I’m seeking clarification on the pros and cons of using RAP and CAP strictly in terms of database usage. Based on my understanding, RAP utilizes the S/4HANA Cloud database within the ABAP environment, whereas CAP works with the S/4HANA Cloud database via the HANA DB Explorer.

In a recent internal discussion with SAP at our company, it was mentioned that the HANA database accessed through the HANA DB Explorer is more stable compared to the one used in the ABAP environment. This has caused some confusion, as I haven't been able to find clear information or articles to verify this.

Could you explain the difference between these databases?

Are there any advantages of one over the other?

Could you provide sample use cases where one would be preferred over the other?

Additionally, in terms of backup and restoration, is it possible to perform this for both environments?

entry.title: Financial Statements F.01 for S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I would like to get the F.01 data by Excel.

My boss told me that need to do copy and paste from the SAP Screen. Is this true?

Is there any other good way to get the excel data by SAP S/4 HANA?

Thank you so much in advance for your help.

Best regards,
